name: Hover
description: A unit with the Hover: Ground or Hover: Air X keyword can make Standby actions during the Make Actions step and can gain and spend Standby tokens. A unit with the Hover: Ground or Hover: Air X keyword can make Reverse Moves. A unit with the Hover: Ground keyword is treated as a Ground Vehicle by other units for all LOS purposes. For all other game effects, the unit is still treated as a Repulsor Vehicle. A unit with the Hover: Air X keyword ignores terrain of height X or lower while Moving and may end a movement overlapping such terrain.

For all other game effects, the unit is still treated as a Repulsor Vehicle. A unit with the Hover: Air X keyword ignores terrain of height X or lower while Moving and may end a movement overlapping such terrain.
